name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ The classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft bag body, with metal knots crafted using jewelry techniques in micro-cast aluminum🪢, and decorative beads made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you switch between elegance and fun💃, unpredictable. Classic and versatile, very temperament-enhancing, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, adjustable shoulder strap, original calf leather feels soft and delicate. A unisex design that breaks gender boundaries, offering a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, blending elegance and casual style, perfectly interprets the look of 'fashion old money'.
